title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Coal Bearing Areas (Acquisition and Development) Act, 1957. (2) It extends to the whole of India, except the State of Jammu and Kashmir*. (3) It shall come into force on such date1as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 12th June, 1957, vide Notification No. S.R.O. 1931 (E), dated 10th June, 1957, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). *. Vide notification No. S.O. 3912(E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
